mnemonics: FATHER: Fluoride Accumulates To Harm Environment Regularly
keyPoints: Fluoride contamination in drinking water can cause health problems such as fluorosis
Excessive fluoride intake can lead to skeletal and dental fluorosis
Removal of excess fluoride from drinking water is essential for public health
commonMistakes: Underestimating the risks associated with high fluoride levels in drinking water
Not implementing proper treatment methods to remove excess fluoride from drinking water
